title: Definitely one quirky night at Freddy's
description:
Freddy was not ready for this...

--------------------------------------
WARNING: From my experience Google Chrome tends to put the audio out of sync, so I suggest you to use another browser to watch this toon!
--------------------------------------

I really enjoyed playing the first game of the FNAF series, back when it was not a big of a deal (and it was not a series yet), since then I wanted to make a parody of it. 

Being this a story that I came up with months ago I wonder how many dozens of other animations I accidentaly ripped off!

Anyway... enjoy!
